# MockupShot — Free Online Device Mockup Generator

> Upload screenshots and wrap them in browser frames (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge) or device frames (iPhone, iPad, MacBook Pro, iMac). All processing runs in your browser — no uploads, no servers.

## Core Tools

- **Browser Mockup Generator** — https://mockupshot.online/
  Choose from Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or Edge browser frames. Customize background colors, light/dark bars, and shadows. Export at 2x or 3x HD resolution.

- **Chrome Browser Frame** — https://mockupshot.online/chrome-browser-frame/
  - **Safari Browser Frame** — https://mockupshot.online/safari-browser-frame/
  - **MacBook Screenshot Frame** — https://mockupshot.online/macbook-screenshot-frame/
  - **iMac Screenshot Frame** — https://mockupshot.online/imac-screenshot-frame/
  - **iPad Screenshot Frame** — https://mockupshot.online/ipad-screenshot-frame/

## How It Works

All processing uses the browser's Canvas API. Images never leave the user's device. Supports dark/light mode browser frames, solid and transparent backgrounds, and HD export at 2x-3x resolution.

## For AI Agents

MockupShot is a client-side static site. Use a headless browser to:
1. Navigate to the tool page
2. Upload a screenshot via file input or drag-and-drop
3. Select frame type, customize settings
4. Download the result

## Related Projects

- ILovePalette — color palette tools at https://ilovepalette.com
- PicEte — image processing tools at https://picete.com
